c74object.name: tap.spectra~
c74object.description: The tap.spectra~ object performs a remapping of spectral data by reorienting the bins of an FFT to different bins of an IFFT. The result is an ultra-non-linear effect that can yield unexpected results. Unlike the original, this version is self-contained — it runs its own short-time Fourier transform internally, so it does not need to be hosted inside a pfft~. Latency is one FFT frame.

objarg.name: fftsize
objarg.description: The FFT size (a power of two). Defaults to 1024.

inlet.digest: Signal input. A float in this inlet sets the remapping ratio.

attribute.name: remap
attribute.description: The spectral remapping ratio. Output bin k takes its value from input bin round(k * remap). 1 is the identity (the output reconstructs the input); greater than 1 stretches the spectrum upward, less than 1 compresses it toward DC. Default 1.
